subject: TC North Stars annual golf tournament

targets.name: Grand Traverse Resort & Casinos
targets.message:
Hello,

My name is Jason Younker, and I'm a parent with the Traverse City North Stars 14U AA travel hockey team. As the host of our fundraiser and a cornerstone of the local golf and hospitality community, you're the first business we wanted to reach.

We're holding our annual golf scramble fundraiser on Saturday, August 16, 2026 at Grand Traverse Resort (Spruce Run course), 9:00 AM shotgun start. It's the team's biggest fundraiser of the year and helps cover ice time, league fees, tournament entries, and travel so those costs don't fall entirely on our families.

We'd be grateful for Grand Traverse Resort's support at whatever level fits:

  Stanley Cup - $2,000: golf + lunch for a foursome, plus primary contest signage
  Playmaker   - $1,000: primary contest signage
  Hat-Trick   -   $500: event hole signage
  General     -   $250: hole or tee signage

Grand Traverse Hockey Association is a 501(c)(3) (EIN 38-3347536), so sponsorships are fully tax-deductible. To appear on event signage, we'd need to confirm by our signage deadline of August 3, 2026.

Checks are payable to GTHA (memo "Grand Traverse Resort - 14UAA Golf Outing"), mailed to GTHA Sponsorship, 1600 Chartwell Dr., Traverse City, MI 49696; Venmo @Northstars14UAA also works. Gift cards or product for our prize tables are welcome too.

Thank you for considering it - it makes a real difference for these kids.

Jason Younker
TC North Stars 14U AA Travel Hockey
206-795-4418 | jason@ynkr.org
